reason: Approved design defines worklog scope, entry shape, closeout prompt behavior, and non-goals.
Implementation must execute rollout steps in order and update step status.
Requirement explains user-visible worklog/report-feed capability and boundaries.
Roadmap defines Work Record Module and item sequencing.
Worklog / Report-feed Record contract is a hard roadmap companion constraint.
Explore evidence maps Trellis journal to ByteTrue worklog/report-feed rather than raw transcript journal.
Closeout prompts and scoped commit ordering must follow shared convention rules.
Implementation completion report must include review gate evidence before acceptance.
